prompt: Photorealistic studio portrait of a 35-year-old man, French, pale skin, dark brown neat hair, thin black frame glasses. Working as Agent Comptable in a modern Paris office. Precise focused neutral-warm expression. Wearing charcoal slim-fit suit, light grey shirt. Warm natural window light (soft overhead key + gentle fill), soft beige #ede3d2 backdrop, shallow depth of field, 85mm f/1.8, skin texture preserved (pores, fine lines). Editorial magazine quality. No text, no logos, no watermarks. Vertical 9:16 composition, subject centered, upper-body framing.
